# dokku_app_port (Resource)

Manages a single port mapping on a Dokku app (`dokku ports:add`).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `app` (String)
- `container_port` (Number) Container-facing port.
- `host_port` (Number) Host-facing port.
- `scheme` (String) Proxy scheme, e.g. http, https, tcp.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
